subcodes.first_line: O Jinab-i-Baqir! Thou who art masterful over the self, possessed of a pure heart, with watchful eyes and an ever-present spirit - how blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جناب باقر ماهر بر نفس قاهری و بقلب طاهری و بدیده ناظری و بروح حاضری خوشا
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @being a source of light; guidance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
